strengths: Proven full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP
Strong testing mindset with TDD, CI/CD, and multiple testing frameworks (e.g., Vitest, Jest, Selenium)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, the primary backend framework listed in the job description
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or MySQL usage in recent roles, relying on MongoDB and SQL
Scattered focus on diverse languages (Dlang, Swift) rather than deep specialization in required stacks
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js expertise with React, testing frameworks, and AI tooling, aligning well with core stack requirements. However, he lacks explicit Nest.js or PostgreSQL/MySQL experience in recent roles, and his diverse language focus (Dlang, Swift) may dilute depth in the primary stack. His AI agent work is a notable strength for emerging trends.
